## Research Question

What decision or uncertainty should this research resolve?

## Background

Summarize existing context, links, and assumptions.

## Expected Output

- [ ] Findings summary
- [ ] Recommendation
- [ ] Risks and tradeoffs
- [ ] Follow-up implementation issue if needed

## Boundaries

This issue should not introduce production behavior unless separately approved.

## Validation

How will the research result be checked or reviewed?
